# Hebrews 3

## Verses (19)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | For this reason, holy brothers, marked out to have a part in heaven, give thought to Jesus the representative and high priest of our faith; | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Who kept faith with God who gave him his place, even as Moses did in all his house. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | And it was right for this man to have more honour than Moses, even as the builder of a house has more honour than the house. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | For every house has a builder; but the builder of all things is God. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | And Moses certainly kept faith as a servant, in all his house, and as a witness of those things which were to be said later; | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | But Christ as a son, over his house; whose house are we, if we keep our hearts fixed in the glad and certain hope till the end. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | And so, as the Holy Spirit says, Today if you let his voice come to your ears, | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Be not hard of heart, as when you made me angry, on the day of testing in the waste land, | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | When your fathers put me to the test, and saw my works for forty years. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | So that I was angry with this generation, and I said, Their hearts are in error at all times, and they have no knowledge of my ways; | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | And being angry I made an oath, saying, They may not come into my rest. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | My brothers, take care that there is not by chance in any one of you an evil heart without belief, turning away from the living God: | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | But give comfort to one another every day as long as it is still Today; so that no one among you may be made hard by the deceit of sin: | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | For if we keep the substance of the faith which we had at the start, even till the end, we have a part with Christ; | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | As it is said, Today if you will let his voice come to your ears, be not hard of heart, as when you made him angry. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | Who made him angry when his voice came to them? was it not all those who came out of Egypt with Moses? | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | And with whom was he angry for forty years? was it not with those who did evil, who came to their deaths in the waste land? | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | And to whom did he make an oath that they might not come into his rest? was it not to those who went against his orders? | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | So we see that they were not able to go in because they had no belief. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
